name: Pistachio Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup finely ground, lightly toasted, unsalted natural pistachios
recipeInstructions:
1. Use Nut Crust recipe found under Crust Variations.
2. Use Basic cheesecake recipe.
3. Mix 1/2 cup finely ground, lightly toasted, unsalted natural pistachios, 1 tbsp lemon juice, 1/2 tsp almond extract, and 3-4 drops green food coloring into the basic batter at the end.
4. Pour the mixture into a prepared pan.
5. Bake as directed.
6. Garnish with chopped pistachios.
